hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Meet your guides to discovering Georgia's hidden treasures

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Georgian Treasure was founded in 2019 when a group of local enthusiasts decided to share Georgia's unique beauty with the world. Our mission was to create authentic, personalized tours that show the real face of Adjara.
story.paragraph2: Today, we are one of the leading tour companies in Batumi, serving thousands of tourists annually. Our team consists of professional guides who speak 6 languages and know every secret of the region.
story.paragraph3: Our goal is to create unforgettable memories for every traveler who wants to discover Georgia's true treasure.
